package rulecoverage

func PositiveInitSideEffect() string {
    ruleID := "init_side_effect"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "init() functions that perform network, file-system, or subprocess side effects."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
